item.title: Who is Zekeriya AY?
item.description: A computer engineering undergraduate student at Bursa Uludag University. In the first year of university, I dealt with image processing thanks to İTÜRO. I develop projects to gain experience in software, coding. In December 2020, I decided to deal with cybersecurity. I am trying to have basic knowledge of many subjects, but I work more defensive security because I am interested in. By using the GNU/Linux operating system in daily life, I am improving my knowledge day by day.
